name: Interactive Session
summary: Start short interactive compute sessions for debugging and notebooks.
description: This skill provides conservative Slurm interactive session recipes for shell debugging, Jupyter, RStudio, and IDE tunnels.

inputs.name: time
inputs.description: Short wall time for the interactive allocation.

outputs.name: interactive_shell
outputs.description: A shell running on an allocated compute node.

outputs.name: connection_notes
outputs.description: Port forwarding notes for notebook or IDE access.

examples.title: Start Jupyter on a compute node

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example scripts.
Request a short debug allocation and confirm the shell runs on a compute node.
